sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n49545" key="qurwrei=on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θῠρωρ-εῖον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n49545.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">porter's lodge</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vitr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.7.1</biblScope> </bibl> (dub.).</sense> </entryFree>
